item.title: Federal agencies miss GENIUS Act one-year deadline; 10 proposed stablecoin rules issued, final implementation rules still pending
US Treasury opens second public comment round on GENIUS Act stablecoin rules as $310B market awaits final regulatory framework
SEC plans July proposal to exempt selected digital-asset activities from securities registration in first major crypto rulemaking
DTCC processes first live production trades in tokenized ETFs, equities and US Treasurys alongside JPMorgan and BlackRock
US and UK regulators release 10-point roadmap to align stablecoin and tokenized-asset oversight across both major financial markets
UK FCA publishes final crypto regulatory framework permitting non-UK stablecoins and access to overseas trading venues
US CLARITY Act Senate floor vote date set; passage depends on seven Democratic votes for digital asset market structure legislation
Ostium loses $18M after attacker submits falsified future-dated oracle data to drain public liquidity vault
Aptos patches critical flaw that ethical hackers found could expose $70B in on-chain assets to systemic validator attack
JPMorgan raises Bitcoin ETF holdings 174% to 8.3M BlackRock IBIT shares in Q1 2026, expanding Fidelity and Bitwise positions
Wall Street transfer agents lobby SEC warning that third-party tokenized stock tokens pose market integrity and ownership risks
Summer.fi halts yield vaults after $6M flash loan exploit manipulates USDC vault accounting to inflate and redeem assets
Binance receives VASP license from Bank of Spain, enabling regulated crypto exchange and custody services under AML rules
Bonzo Lend loses $9M in oracle exploit on Hedera, extending a wave of oracle-targeted DeFi attacks in July 2026
Deutsche Bank plans to launch crypto custody accounts for institutional clients, joining post-SAB 121 banking expansion
